_meta.name: Booking request — dates + guest count present
_meta.description: Guest provides dates and guest count. Bot should recognise booking_flow, check required fields, and draft a clarifying question about package type (all required fields except package intent are present).
_meta.payload_format: Meta-envelope (WhatsApp path). POST the whole file — n8n wraps body under input.body; Normalize reads input.body.entry[0].changes[0].value. Underscored keys are ignored.

_webhook.note: POST this entire file. n8n nests it under input.body. Normalize Incoming Message reads the Meta-envelope via input.body.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].

text.body: Hi, I want to book for 2 people from April 10 to April 17. Do you have availability?

_assertions.expected_draft_behavior: Ask guest for package type (Malibu / Uluwatu / Waimea / accommodation-only) before proceeding to hold creation

expected_logging.workflow_events: ≥1 row: route=booking_flow, confidence, missing_fields in payload
